'''鈭歭-d-ch-z''' ('''kaladchezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jelk|jelk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jelk|jelk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-d-ch-z
|-
! Lemma
| kaladchezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladchezoko|thiladchezoko]] || [[word:jiladchezoko|jiladchezoko]] || [[word:shiladchezoko|shiladchezoko]] || [[word:kiladchezoko|kiladchezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladchezoko|thuthuladchezoko]] || [[word:jujuladchezoko|jujuladchezoko]] || [[word:shushuladchezoko|shushuladchezoko]] || [[word:kukuladchezoko|kukuladchezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholadchezoko|tholadchezoko]] || [[word:joladchezoko|joladchezoko]] || [[word:sholadchezoko|sholadchezoko]] || [[word:koladchezoko|koladchezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ladchezoko|th忙ladchezoko]] || [[word:j忙ladchezoko|j忙ladchezoko]] || [[word:sh忙ladchezoko|sh忙ladchezoko]] || [[word:k忙ladchezoko|k忙ladchezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
